@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent computed the simple mean of per-business average ratings (from the grouped review results) for businesses matched by "Indianapolis, IN" and returned that value, rather than calculating the overall average across all individual reviews for those businesses, as shown by averaging the grouped averages in execute_python after queries var_call_mwqAJKF0csnVc9F1foUfIhMq and var_call_EmJ900ExD9W4q26D9sMbdokt.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@
